overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a foggy autumn landscape along the Ishinari River. The scene transitions from grassy hillsides to shallow river water as golden morning light filters through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with autumn foliage overlooking river valley

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking down grassy slope toward the distant waterfall and river

entered.detail: golden autumn grass covering the sloping terrain
cascading waterfall visible through the mist in the distance
large stone outcropping on the left side of the valley
scattered trees with red and orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy autumn morning with the samurai character walking down a grassy hillside. A waterfall is visible in the misty distance while rocky cliffs and colorful autumn trees frame the valley leading down to the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined riverbank with shallow water entry

events.description: character steps from grassy terrain onto rocky riverbank and enters shallow water
on-screen text 'ISHINARI RIVER' appears identifying the location

agents.ego_description: samurai stepping into the river shallows, creating ripples in the water as he moves along the bank

entered.detail: shallow river water with visible stones beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to the rocky riverbank, entering the shallow water of the Ishinari River. White-barked birch trees line the bank while the autumn trees shift to the left side of the frame as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty river with strong sun glare and distant shoreline

events.description: sun glare intensifies dramatically as character walks toward the light source through thick fog

agents.ego_description: samurai wading through knee-deep water following the river current toward the bright sun

entered.detail: bright golden sun reflecting off the water surface through dense fog
foggy tree-lined bank on the opposite side of the river
rocky shoreline with scattered autumn leaves
traditional Japanese gate structure visible in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks deeper into the river as the scene becomes heavily backlit by golden morning sun piercing through thick fog. A distant torii gate and stone embankment appear on the left while the opposite shore fades into the misty background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty autumn hillside down into the golden, backlit waters of the Ishinari River. It begins with the samurai descending a grassy slope framed by rocky cliffs and colorful trees, with a distant waterfall partially obscured by the morning fog. As the character reaches the valley floor, the terrain shifts from grass to a rocky riverbank, leading the camera into shallow water lined by white-barked birch trees. The scene then expands as the samurai walks deeper into the river, where the lighting transforms into a brilliant golden glow piercing through the thick mist. Finally, the view opens to reveal a distant torii gate and stone embankment on the left while the opposite shore fades into the hazy background.
